headline: Gen Expands Insurance Capabilities of Engine, Gen's Secure Financial Wellness Marketplace
summary: Gen (NASDAQ: GEN), a global leader dedicated to powering Digital Freedom, today announced it has acquired Trellis, a technology-driven platform that simplifies and automates shopping for insurance. The acquisition will bring Trellis' intelligent insurance capabilities into Engine by Gen, enhancing the personalized insurance offerings Gen delivers through its financial services partner network.
